title: Manitobans Compete in Canadian Grand Masters
excerpt: ​Congratulations to: Michael Audette, Brendan Chartrand, Jane Cory, and Simon Reimer. They represented Manitoba at the Canadian Grand Masters Fiddling Competition in Morinville, AB from August 26 -...
bodyHtml:
​Congratulations to: Michael Audette, Brendan Chartrand, Jane Cory, and Simon Reimer.
They represented Manitoba at the Canadian Grand Masters Fiddling Competition in Morinville, AB from August 26 - 28, 2016.
We are proud to have you represent our province!
